testcase.name: MarkdownRenderer Component > Rendering > renders basic markdown content
MarkdownRenderer Component > Rendering > renders paragraph text
MarkdownRenderer Component > Rendering > renders multiple headings
MarkdownRenderer Component > Rendering > applies custom className
MarkdownRenderer Component > Text Formatting > renders bold text
MarkdownRenderer Component > Text Formatting > renders italic text
MarkdownRenderer Component > Text Formatting > renders strikethrough text (GFM)
MarkdownRenderer Component > Text Formatting > renders inline code
MarkdownRenderer Component > Links > renders internal links
MarkdownRenderer Component > Links > renders external links with security attributes
MarkdownRenderer Component > Links > handles HTTP links as external
MarkdownRenderer Component > Lists > renders unordered lists
MarkdownRenderer Component > Lists > renders ordered lists
MarkdownRenderer Component > Lists > renders task lists (GFM)
MarkdownRenderer Component > Code Blocks > renders code blocks
MarkdownRenderer Component > Code Blocks > renders code blocks with language syntax

failure.message:
Unable to find an element with the text: const foo = "bar";. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. Ignored nodes: comments, script, style [36m[39m [36m
[39m [36m[39m [36m[39m [36m[39m [36m[39m [0mconst[0m [36m[39m [0m foo = [0m [36m[39m [0m"bar"[0m [36m[39m [0m; [0m [36m[39m [36m[39m [36m
[39m [36m[39m [36m[39m

testcase.failure:
TestingLibraryElementError: Unable to find an element with the text: const foo = "bar";. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. In this case, you can provide a function for your text matcher to make your matcher more flexible. Ignored nodes: comments, script, style 
        
          
            const
          
           foo = 
          
            "bar"
          
          ;

testcase.name: MarkdownRenderer Component > Code Blocks > wraps code blocks in pre tag
MarkdownRenderer Component > Images > renders images with alt text
MarkdownRenderer Component > Images > uses lazy loading for images
MarkdownRenderer Component > Images > provides fallback alt when missing
MarkdownRenderer Component > Blockquotes > renders blockquotes
MarkdownRenderer Component > Blockquotes > renders multi-line blockquotes
MarkdownRenderer Component > Horizontal Rules > renders horizontal rules
MarkdownRenderer Component > Tables (GFM) > renders tables
MarkdownRenderer Component > Tables (GFM) > renders table in scrollable container
MarkdownRenderer Component > Sanitization > sanitizes dangerous HTML by default
MarkdownRenderer Component > Sanitization > allows sanitization to be disabled
MarkdownRenderer Component > Sanitization > prevents XSS in links
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles empty content
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles whitespace-only content
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles very long content
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles special characters
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles nested formatting
MarkdownRenderer Component > Edge Cases > handles malformed markdown gracefully
MarkdownRenderer Component > Accessibility > uses semantic HTML elements
MarkdownRenderer Component > Accessibility > provides alt text for images
MarkdownRenderer Component > Accessibility > maintains link accessibility
MarkdownRenderer Component > Accessibility > properly structures lists for screen readers
MarkdownRenderer Component > Styling > applies markdown-renderer wrapper class
MarkdownRenderer Component > Styling > applies custom classes alongside default ones
MarkdownRenderer Component > Styling > applies explicit text color classes to elements
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders plain text
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders bold text
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders italic text
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders strikethrough text
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders headings
MarkdownRenderer > Basic Rendering > renders paragraphs
MarkdownRenderer > Lists > renders unordered lists
MarkdownRenderer > Lists > renders ordered lists
MarkdownRenderer > Code Rendering > renders inline code
MarkdownRenderer > Code Rendering > renders code blocks

testcase.name: MarkdownRenderer > Links > renders links
MarkdownRenderer > Links > renders external links with security attributes
MarkdownRenderer > Links > blocks javascript: protocol
MarkdownRenderer > Tables (GitHub Flavored Markdown) > renders tables
MarkdownRenderer > Blockquotes > renders blockquotes
MarkdownRenderer > Security > blocks script tags
MarkdownRenderer > Security > blocks data: protocol

testcase.name: MarkdownRenderer > Security > sanitizes null bytes
MarkdownRenderer > Edge Cases > renders empty content as null
MarkdownRenderer > Edge Cases > handles non-string content gracefully
MarkdownRenderer > Edge Cases > handles undefined content
MarkdownRenderer > Edge Cases > trims whitespace
MarkdownRenderer > Accessibility > has proper ARIA role
MarkdownRenderer > Accessibility > has proper ARIA label
